description_long: This is a tall, modern kitchen cabinet unit featuring a combination of dark wood and light-colored panels. The front side displays a built-in microwave and oven, with a countertop section and three metallic handles on lower drawers. The upper section includes a cupboard with a sleek, handle-less door, while the left side is decorated with alternating black and gray horizontal stripes. The right and rear sides are solid black, giving the unit a contemporary, minimalist appearance. The cabinet is designed for urban environments, such as apartment kitchens or communal spaces, and appears to be constructed primarily from wood, metal, and composite materials.
description: A tall, modern kitchen cabinet with built-in appliances, dark wood panels, and metallic handles, featuring a striped side and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing built-in microwave, oven, countertop, drawers with handles, and upper cupboard.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the depth of the countertop and the overhanging upper cupboard.
description_view_2: Rear view with a bold black and gray striped pattern, no visible functional features.
description_view_3: Right side view, solid black with no visible features or openings.
